parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description:
## Authentication
The Deel API uses bearer tokens to authenticate requests. All API calls must be made over HTTPS — calls over plain HTTP or without authentication will fail.

```curl
curl -X GET 'https://api.letsdeel.com/rest/v2/contracts' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR-TOKEN-HERE'
```

[Learn more about authentication](/api/authentication)

400.description: Bad request. The file is missing or the document_id format is invalid.

401.description: Authentication failed. Bearer token is missing, expired, or invalid.

403.description: Forbidden. The worker does not have permission to upload to this compliance document, the document cannot be submitted in its current state, or the requirement is obsolete.

500.description: Internal server error. The file upload failed or an unexpected error occurred.

file.description: The employee compliance document to upload. Accepted formats: PNG, JPG, JPEG, HEIC, PDF.

id.description: Unique identifier for the compliance document requirement.

name.description: Display name of the compliance document.

status.description: Review status of the uploaded document, null if no document has been uploaded yet.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code where the document is required.

fillable.description: Whether the document can be filled through the Deel platform.

filenames.description: List of uploaded file names. Empty array when no files have been uploaded.

description.description: Description of the document requirement. Empty string when no description exists.

is_optional.description: Whether the document is optional for the worker. Also true when the document is required within 30 days.

uploaded_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was uploaded, null if no document has been uploaded.

has_template.description: Whether a template is available for this document.

rejection_message.description: Plain text message explaining why the document was rejected. Empty string when no rejection message exists.

is_consent_required.description: Whether consent is required for acknowledgement-only documents. Only present when is_acknowledgement_only_document is true.

required_in_30_days.description: Whether the document is required within 30 days of employment start.

is_acknowledgement_only_document.description: Whether this document only requires acknowledgement without file upload.

documents.description: List of compliance documents required for the worker.

success.description: Indicates whether the file upload was successful.

id.description: Document Id.

reason.description: Reason why the contract is being terminated

attachments.description: This field allows for uploading multiple files at once. Attach any document that is important for the request to terminate the contract. Includes common image formats (JPG, JPEG, PNG, HEIC) and PDF documents

is_sensitive.description: Defines whether the termination is sensitive. In this case, only the person requesting the termination will be able to view the termination, receive emails or notifications.

reason_detail.description: Optional field to describe the reason behind the resignation request

severance_type.description: The type of severance selected by the client. It's an optional field

desired_end_date.description: The desired end date. If the date is not provided, it will be selected by HRX the closest date possible

additional_reason.description: An additional reason can be provided in case the reason selected is MOVING_EMPLOYEE_TO_INTERNAL_ENTITY

termination_notes.description: Additional notes can be provided regarding the termination for Deel, like questions and doubts

eligible_for_rehire.description: Parameter to inform whether it would be possible for the client to hire the employee again

eligible_for_rehire_reason.description: Describe if the option DONT_KNOW was selected on eligible_for_rehire

is_employee_staying_with_deel.description: Defines if employee will keep using Deel as provider

deelToken.description:
## Authentication
The Deel API uses bearer tokens to authenticate requests. All API calls must be made over HTTPS — calls over plain HTTP or without authentication will fail.

```curl
curl -X GET 'https://api.letsdeel.com/rest/v2/contracts' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR-TOKEN-HERE'
```

[Learn more about authentication](/api/authentication)

oauth2.description: Standard OAuth2 security scheme based on https://swagger.io/docs/specification/authentication/
